parts.text:
{
  "mission_codename": "OPERATION GHOST ECHO",
  "target": "Our inaugural target is the impenetrable Elysium Data Vault, a digital fortress guarding the cryptographic keys to the city's entire energy grid.",
  "location_flavor": "Set during the city's annual 'Hour of Silence' at dusk, we have a critical 17-minute window when automated security protocols briefly dip, coinciding with the city-wide power fluctuation.",
  "antagonist_move": "Inspector Vega has just activated a new 'Blackout Protocol' across the district, randomly re-routing surveillance camera feeds every few minutes.",
  "briefing_text": "The city hums with the illusion of impenetrable security, its citizens oblivious to the digital threads that weave their lives together. Tonight, we're not just stealing data; we're establishing our presence, a whisper in the silent corners of their hyper-connected world. Your meticulous planning is paramount, as the entire city's infrastructure is a delicate ecosystem we're about to subtly, yet profoundly, disrupt. This first move is a declaration; ensure it's heard.",
  "mission_hook": "The vault's primary defenses are psychological, designed to overwhelm planners with a cascade of false security data and decoy network architecture."
}
